flags.label: Hatch New Assistant
flags.description: Show Hatch New Assistant action in Settings > Account

flags.label: Guardian Verification Setup
flags.description: Enable guardian verification routing in the system prompt

flags.label: Browser
flags.description: Enable browser skill prerequisites section in the system prompt

flags.label: Messaging
flags.description: Enable messaging skill section in the system prompt

flags.label: Messaging: Gmail
flags.description: Allow messaging tools to operate on the Gmail platform

flags.label: Messaging: Telegram
flags.description: Allow messaging tools to operate on the Telegram platform

flags.label: Collect usage data
flags.description: Send crash reports and error diagnostics to help improve the app

flags.label: Command Palette
flags.description: Enable the CMD+K command palette for unified search across conversations, memories, schedules, and contacts

flags.label: Contacts
flags.description: Show the Contacts tab in Settings for viewing and managing contacts

flags.label: Outbound Proxy Sidecar
flags.description: Route proxy session management through the sidecar process instead of running in-process

flags.label: App Builder Multi-file
flags.description: Enable multi-file TSX app creation with esbuild compilation instead of single-HTML apps

flags.label: Sentry Testing
flags.description: Show the Sentry Testing tab in Settings for triggering test crash reports and error events

flags.label: Gmail
flags.description: Enable Gmail management skill (archive, label, triage, declutter)
